data.title: Info-Tech Research Group report identifies top Talent Management platforms for HR in 2025, aiding talent acquisition and development.
data.description: A new Data Quadrant report by Info-Tech Research Group has unveiled the top Talent Management platforms of 2025, as rated by users. These platforms are being utilized by HR teams to enhance talent acquisition, development, and workforce management. The report provides valuable insights...

data.title: Dr. Andrew Gomes Scholarship for Veterans opens applications for U.S. military veterans in higher education programs nationwide.
data.description: The application cycle for the Dr. Andrew Gomes Scholarship for Veterans has commenced in Houston on July 24, 2025. Eligible U.S. military veterans enrolled in undergraduate programs nationwide are encouraged to apply for this significant academic opportunity. The scholarship offers support to veterans, with a considerable number of applicants expected to benefit from this initiative.

data.title: Centric Software wins Just Food Excellence Awards 3 years in a row. 5-time winner for 2025 in multiple categories.
data.description: Centric Software, a leading Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) provider in the food and beverage industry, has been honored with five Just Food awards in 2025. The awards were received for excellence in Research and Development, Mergers and Acquisitions, Innovation, Business Expansion, and Product Launches. Based in CAMPBELL, Calif., the company has been recognized multiple times for its achievements within the industry.

data.title: California oil refiners made $1.01 per gallon in gross profits in May, $1.05 in retail sales.
data.description: In July 24, 2025, it was reported that the profits per gallon for California oil refiners increased to over $1 in May, based on data from the California Energy Commission (CEC). The CEC also revealed that the gross margins of oil refiners rose from 43 cents per gallon in January.

data.title: Dr. Omar Massoud launches scholarship for undergraduate future doctors in the US; applications open for 2026 cycle.
data.description: Cleveland, 24th July 2025 - The application window for the 2026 academic cycle of the Dr. Omar Massoud Scholarship for Future Doctors has been announced. This scholarship is open to undergraduate students nationwide in the United States who are dedicated to pursuing a career in medicine. Established by...

data.title: Toastmasters International Convention in Philadelphia on Aug 20-23 will feature 20 inspiring speakers and 28 contestants.
data.description: In Englewood, Colorado, the 2025 International Convention of Toastmasters International is set to take place from August 20 to 23 in Philadelphia, PA. The event will feature a notable roster of over 20 speakers and 28 contestants participating in the speaking competition. Scheduled to be a source of inspiration and skill development for attendees, this year's convention promises to offer valuable insights and opportunities for growth.

data.title: Dr. Azfar Malik offers nationwide scholarship for healthcare students for 2026 academic cycle. #MedicalScholarship #HealthcareProfessionals
data.description: A scholarship opportunity for medical students, the Dr. Azfar Malik Scholarship, is currently open for applications for the academic year 2026. This scholarship provides a valuable opportunity for undergraduate students in the United States who are committed to improving healthcare. Applications are being accepted starting from July 24, 2025.

data.title: PEPE gains 28% monthly, with bullish momentum fueled by 10% daily rally and Ethereum surge, eyeing $0.000024.
data.description: PEPE is experiencing a surge in trading activity, driven by a 10% increase in value over the course of a day. This positive momentum is further bolstered by significant purchases from high-volume traders as well as a strong uptrend in Ethereum. Technical analysis indicates a bullish trend, with the occurrence of a double golden cross suggesting a potential price target of $0.000024.

data.title: Serta Simmons Bedding unveils Serta iSeries NXG mattress collection with focus on cooling, pressure relief, and support.
data.description: In Doraville, Georgia, Serta Simmons Bedding (SSB) unveiled the latest Serta® iSeries NXG™ mattress collection, designed to meet the demands of modern consumers. This new line focuses on offering immediate cooling, instant pressure relief, and optimal support at affordable premium prices. Anne Edwards, Senior Vice President of Serta Brand Marketing, emphasized the importance of consumer feedback in developing this innovative range. The Serta® iSeries NXG™ is set to provide a superior sleep experience with its cutting-edge features, catering to the needs of a wide audience.

data.title: Webull (BULL) to announce Q2 2025 earnings on Aug 28; earnings released after market close; conference call at 5 p.m. ET.
data.description: A company based in St. Petersburg, Florida, Webull Corporation (NASDAQ: BULL), is set to reveal its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 on August 28, 2025, post-market closure. The management will conduct a conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day to delve into the results. The event will provide insights into the company's progress and financial standing to investors and stakeholders. More details on this announcement can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Tracy Mousner appointed Senior VP of Four Corners region by ExchangeRight to serve financial advisors across 4 states.
data.description: Tracy Mousner has been named senior vice president for the Four Corners region by ExchangeRight, a prominent real estate REIT and DST investments provider based in Pasadena, California. In this capacity, Mousner is tasked with supporting financial advisors and representatives in Colorado, Arizona, New Mexico, and Utah. His responsibilities include enhancing partnerships and providing advisors with opportunities to invest in ExchangeRight’s array of REIT and 1031 DST portfolios. This move is part of ExchangeRight's strategic effort to strengthen its presence in the region and offer valuable investment options for advisors and investors alike.

data.title: FNB introduces new business platform on eStore, allowing for applying to 40+ banking products simultaneously.
data.description: Pittsburgh, July 24, 2025 - F.N.B. Corporation (NYSE: FNB) and its banking subsidiary, First National Bank, have introduced a new system that allows consumers and small businesses to apply for over 40 banking products at the same time through a single streamlined process. This initiative aims to simplify and expedite the application process for customers. This will provide significant convenience and flexibility for individuals and businesses looking to access banking products. The system is now live and accessible to interested parties.

data.title: NCTC appoints Rob Koester as COO with 25 years experience in telecom. Effective September 8, 2025.
data.description: In Overland Park, Kansas, on July 24, 2025, the National Content and Technology Cooperative, Inc. (NCTC) shared that Rob Koester will assume the role of Chief Operating Officer on September 8, 2025. Koester brings over 25 years of telecommunications expertise to his new position.

data.title: Auburn Engineering breaks ground on a Gulf Coast Engineering Research Station in Orange Beach, Ala.
data.description: In Orange Beach, Alabama, on July 24, 2025, it was reported that engineers from Auburn University are embarking on a project to enhance the Gulf Coast's resilience. A groundbreaking ceremony was held, with the Samuel Ginn College of Engineering leading the initiative. The engineers are set to utilize their expertise to construct a more robust shoreline, aiming to mitigate the impacts of natural disasters. This endeavor signifies a significant investment in the region's infrastructure, with a focus on long-term sustainability and protection.

data.title: Study shows IoT fire safety solution reduces fire damage claims by $81 per home annually, lowering non-catastrophic claims by 63%.
data.description: In Malvern, Pennsylvania, a recent study revealed that fire prevention technology utilizing the Internet of Things (IoT) has successfully decreased a wide range of non-catastrophic fire claims by approximately 63%.

data.title: IQSTEL issues letter outlining plans: NASDAQ uplisting, $400M run rate, $1B revenue vision.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, IQSTEL Inc., listed on NASDAQ as IQST, a prominent company offering telecom, fintech, AI, and cybersecurity solutions, shared a detailed shareholder letter summarizing an investor interview led by Michael Poarch with the CEO and CFO.
